case_title: VICTORIA GOLUNOVA VS. SURAJ K. RAJWANI

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLUNOVA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA GOLUNOVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00);DOCUMENT STAMPED: 'BY FAX' SERVED FEB-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLUNOVA, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K. $507.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $657.00, FOR CHECK WRITTEN ON CLOSED ACCOUNT & PENALTY PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1719(A)(2) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $786.67 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 05/01/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GOLUNOVA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
